text.title: ES Fundamentals Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping audit-need + schema-stability to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is full audit history required (regulator / customer / time-travel debugging)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: state-stored aggregate + ddd-domain-events for notifications

branch.question: Schema stable (≤ 3 breaking changes in last 6 months)?

conclusion.verdict: defer: revisit ES when schema settles; meanwhile use ddd-domain-events

branch.question: Can the team commit to past-tense business-fact event names?

conclusion.verdict: defer: train team on past-tense events first; otherwise the log degenerates
adopt ES: one stream per aggregate instance, append-only log, replay-derived state

text.example: audit=true → schema_stable=true → naming_discipline=true → adopt ES with OrderPlaced/ItemAdded/... catalog.
